endpoints.name: GET /admin/datatransfer/v1/applications
endpoints.description: Lists the applications available for data transfer for a customer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /admin/datatransfer/v1/applications/{applicationId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves information about an application for the given application ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: GET /admin/datatransfer/v1/transfers
endpoints.description: Lists the transfers for a customer by source user, destination user, or status.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /admin/datatransfer/v1/transfers
endpoints.description: Inserts a data transfer request. See the [Transfer parameters](/admin-sdk/data-transfer/v1/parameters) reference for specific application requirements.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /admin/datatransfer/v1/transfers/{dataTransferId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves a data transfer request by its resource ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DATATRANSFERID}} with a real datatransferid.
